title: The Man with a Shotgun
writer: Satoru Suyama, Takeo Matsuura, Yoshikazu Ishii
actors: Hideaki Nitani, Izumi Ashikawa, Yûji Odaka
plot: Ryoji, a wanderer, arrives in a remote mountain town, carrying a shotgun and claiming to be a hunter. He quickly becomes embroiled in a web of trouble surrounding the town's mill.
